title: calocephalus skeatsiana
intro: Calocephalus skeatsiana, also known as the woolly-head, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Calocephalus skeatsiana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Calocephalus skeatsiana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
